name: Hospital Day 3 — Liver Mass / Malignancy Workup
facility: University of Maryland Medical Center — Inpatient Lab

results.name: AFP (alpha-fetoprotein)
results.interpretation: Mildly elevated and NONSPECIFIC — does not establish a diagnosis; tissue is needed.

interpretation: Mild transaminitis with preserved synthetic function. Tumor markers are non-diagnostic (AFP mildly and nonspecifically elevated; CEA and CA 19-9 normal). Hepatitis B and C negative. These narrow but do not resolve the liver-mass differential — a tissue diagnosis (biopsy) remains the recommendation. Inherited-thrombophilia testing was deferred, as results are unreliable during acute thrombosis and on anticoagulation.
